name: Pumpkin Pie II
recipeIngredient: 1 Baked 9-inch pastry shell (in a non-metallic pie pan)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except the pastry shell and beat until well combined.
2. Pour the pumpkin mixture into the pastry shell. If there is too much filling for the shell, the remaining filling may be cooked in cups.
3. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 4 minutes or until edges begin to set.
4. Carefully move the cooked portions toward the center.
5. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven an additional 6 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool before serving.
Variation: Heat 3 or 4 custard cups of filling, uncovered, for 3 to 4 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
